column12: CRS is deployed without configuration! Please copy the crs-setup.conf.example template to crs-setup.conf, and include the crs-setup.conf file in your webserver configuration before including the CRS rules. See the INSTALL file in the CRS directory for detailed instructions
Enabling forced body inspection for ASCII content
Sampling: Disable the rule engine based on sampling_percentage %{TX.sampling_percentage} and random number %{TX.sampling_rnd100}
Detection paranoia level configured is lower than the paranoia level itself. This is illegal. Blocking request. Aborting
